tEn: Encoder-Decoder with Atrous Separable Convolution for Semantic Image Segmentation
tZh: 基于空洞可分离卷积的编码器-解码器用于语义图像分割
sEn: DeepLabv3+ combines spatial pyramid pooling and encoder-decoder structures for sharper boundaries and multi-scale context.
sZh: DeepLabv3+结合空间金字塔池化和编码器-解码器结构，实现更清晰的边界和多尺度上下文。
absEn: Spatial pyramid pooling module or encode-decoder structure are used in deep neural networks for semantic segmentation task. The former networks are able to encode multi-scale contextual information by probing the incoming features with filters or pooling operations at multiple rates and multiple effective fields-of-view, while the latter networks can capture sharper object boundaries by gradually recovering the spatial information. In this work, we propose to combine the advantages from both methods. Specifically, our proposed model, DeepLabv3+, extends DeepLabv3 by adding a simple yet effective decoder module to refine the segmentation results especially along object boundaries. We further explore the Xception model and apply the depthwise separable convolution to both Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling and decoder modules, resulting in a faster and stronger encoder-decoder network. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed model on PASCAL VOC 2012 and Cityscapes datasets, achieving the test set performance of 89.0\% and 82.1\% without any post-processing. Our paper is accompanied with a publicly available reference implementation of the proposed models in Tensorflow at \url{https://github.com/tensorflow/models/tree/master/research/deeplab}.
absZh: 深度神经网络在语义分割任务中使用了空间金字塔池化模块或编码器-解码器结构。前者通过以多种速率和有效视野对输入特征进行滤波或池化操作，能够编码多尺度上下文信息；而后者通过逐步恢复空间信息，能够捕获更锐利的物体边界。在这项工作中，我们提出结合两种方法的优势。具体来说，我们提出的模型DeepLabv3+通过添加一个简单而有效的解码器模块来细化分割结果，尤其是沿着物体边界。我们进一步探索了Xception模型，并将深度可分离卷积应用于空洞空间金字塔池化和解码器模块，从而得到一个更快更强的编码器-解码器网络。我们在PASCAL VOC 2012和Cityscapes数据集上展示了所提模型的有效性，在无需任何后处理的情况下，测试集性能分别达到89.0%和82.1%。我们的论文附带了所提模型在Tensorflow中的公开参考实现，网址为https://github.com/tensorflow/models/tree/master/research/deeplab。

contrib.en: Proposes DeepLabv3+, combining spatial pyramid pooling and encoder-decoder for semantic segmentation.
contrib.zh: 提出DeepLabv3+，结合空间金字塔池化与编码器-解码器结构用于语义分割。

contrib.en: Adds a simple yet effective decoder module to DeepLabv3 to refine object boundaries.
contrib.zh: 在DeepLabv3基础上添加简单有效的解码器模块以细化物体边界。

contrib.en: Applies depthwise separable convolution to ASPP and decoder for faster and stronger network.
contrib.zh: 将深度可分离卷积应用于ASPP和解码器，实现更快更强的网络。

contrib.en: Adapts Xception model for semantic segmentation with modifications for dense feature extraction.
contrib.zh: 改进Xception模型以适应语义分割，支持密集特征提取。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art results on PASCAL VOC 2012 (89.0%) and Cityscapes (82.1%) without post-processing.
contrib.zh: 在PASCAL VOC 2012（89.0%）和Cityscapes（82.1%）上无需后处理即达到最优结果。

contrib.en: Provides public TensorFlow implementation for reproducibility.
contrib.zh: 提供公开的TensorFlow实现以促进可复现性。

limits.en: Performance evaluated only on PASCAL VOC 2012 and Cityscapes datasets.
limits.zh: 性能仅在PASCAL VOC 2012和Cityscapes数据集上评估。

limits.en: Requires large computational resources for training with output stride 8.
limits.zh: 使用输出步长8训练需要大量计算资源。

limits.en: Decoder design may not generalize to other tasks without tuning.
limits.zh: 解码器设计未经调整可能无法泛化到其他任务。

limits.en: Struggles with heavily occluded objects and rare viewpoints.
limits.zh: 对严重遮挡物体和罕见视角分割困难。

limits.en: No post-processing like CRF used, limiting potential further gains.
limits.zh: 未使用CRF等后处理，限制了潜在性能提升。

items.en: Spatial pyramid pooling module or encode-decoder structure are used in deep neural networks for semantic segmentation task. The former networks are able to encode multi-scale contextual information by probing the incoming features with filters or pooling operations at multiple rates and multiple effective fields-of-view, while the latter networks can capture sharper object boundaries by gradually recovering the spatial information. In this work, we propose to combine the advantages from both methods. Specifically, our proposed model, DeepLabv3+, extends DeepLabv3 by adding a simple yet effective decoder module to refine the segmentation results especially along object boundaries. We further explore the Xception model and apply the depthwise separable convolution to both Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling and decoder modules, resulting in a faster and stronger encoder-decoder network. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed model on PASCAL VOC 2012 and Cityscapes datasets, achieving the test set performance of 89.0% and 82.1% without any post-processing. Our paper is accompanied with a publicly available reference implementation of the proposed models in Tensorflow at https://github.com/tensorflow/models/tree/master/research/deeplab.
items.zh: 在深度神经网络中，空间金字塔池化模块或编码器-解码器结构被用于语义分割任务。前者通过使用多个速率和多个有效视野的滤波器或池化操作探测输入特征，能够编码多尺度上下文信息，而后者通过逐渐恢复空间信息能够捕获更清晰的对象边界。在这项工作中，我们提出结合两种方法的优点。具体来说，我们提出的模型DeepLabv3+通过添加一个简单而有效的解码器模块来扩展DeepLabv3，以细化分割结果，尤其是在对象边界处。我们进一步探索了Xception模型，并将深度可分离卷积应用于空洞空间金字塔池化和解码器模块，从而得到一个更快更强的编码器-解码器网络。我们在PASCAL VOC 2012和Cityscapes数据集上展示了所提模型的有效性，在没有任何后处理的情况下，测试集性能分别达到89.0%和82.1%。我们的论文附带了所提模型在Tensorflow中的公开参考实现，网址为https://github.com/tensorflow/models/tree/master/research/deeplab。

items.capEn: Figure 1: We improve DeepLabv3, which employs the spatial pyramid pooling module (a), with the encoder-decoder structure (b). The proposed model, DeepLabv3+, contains rich semantic information from the encoder module, while the detailed object boundaries are recovered by the simple yet effective decoder module. The encoder module allows us to extract features at an arbitrary resolution by applying atrous convolution.
items.capZh: 图1：我们改进了采用空间金字塔池化模块（a）的DeepLabv3，加入了编码器-解码器结构（b）。所提出的模型DeepLabv3+包含来自编码器模块的丰富语义信息，而详细的对象边界通过简单而有效的解码器模块恢复。编码器模块允许我们通过应用空洞卷积以任意分辨率提取特征。

items.en: Semantic segmentation with the goal to assign semantic labels to every pixel in an image [1, 2, 3, 4, 5] is one of the fundamental topics in computer vision. Deep convolutional neural networks [6, 7, 8, 9, 10] based on the Fully Convolutional Neural Network [8, 11] show striking improvement over systems relying on hand-crafted features [12, 13, 14, 15, 16, 17] on benchmark tasks. In this work, we consider two types of neural networks that use spatial pyramid pooling module [18, 19, 20] or encoder-decoder structure [21, 22] for semantic segmentation, where the former one captures rich contextual information by pooling features at different resolution while the latter one is able to obtain sharp object boundaries.
items.zh: 语义分割的目标是为图像中的每个像素分配语义标签[1,2,3,4,5]，是计算机视觉的基本课题之一。基于全卷积神经网络[8,11]的深度卷积神经网络[6,7,8,9,10]在基准任务上相比依赖手工特征的系统[12,13,14,15,16,17]显示出显著改进。在这项工作中，我们考虑两种用于语义分割的神经网络：使用空间金字塔池化模块[18,19,20]或编码器-解码器结构[21,22]的网络，前者通过在不同分辨率下池化特征来捕获丰富的上下文信息，而后者能够获得清晰的对象边界。

items.en: In order to capture the contextual information at multiple scales, DeepLabv3 [23] applies several parallel atrous convolution with different rates (called Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling, or ASPP), while PSPNet [24] performs pooling operations at different grid scales. Even though rich semantic information is encoded in the last feature map, detailed information related to object boundaries is missing due to the pooling or convolutions with striding operations within the network backbone. This could be alleviated by applying the atrous convolution to extract denser feature maps. However, given the design of state-of-art neural networks [7, 9, 10, 25, 26] and limited GPU memory, it is computationally prohibitive to extract output feature maps that are 8, or even 4 times smaller than the input resolution. Taking ResNet-101 [25] for example, when applying atrous convolution to extract output features that are 16 times smaller than input resolution, features within the last 3 residual blocks (9 layers) have to be dilated. Even worse, 26 residual blocks (78 layers!) will be affected if output features that are 8 times smaller than input are desired. Thus, it is computationally intensive if denser output features are extracted for this type of models. On the other hand, encoder-decoder models [21, 22] lend themselves to faster computation (since no features are dilated) in the encoder path and gradually recover sharp object boundaries in the decoder path. Attempting to combine the advantages from both methods, we propose to enrich the encoder module in the encoder-decoder networks by incorporating the multi-scale contextual information.
items.zh: 为了捕获多尺度的上下文信息，DeepLabv3 [23]应用了几个具有不同速率的并行空洞卷积（称为空洞空间金字塔池化，或ASPP），而PSPNet [24]在不同网格尺度上执行池化操作。尽管最后一个特征图中编码了丰富的语义信息，但由于网络骨干中的池化或带步长的卷积操作，与对象边界相关的细节信息会丢失。这可以通过应用空洞卷积提取更密集的特征图来缓解。然而，考虑到最先进神经网络的设计[7,9,10,25,26]和有限的GPU内存，提取比输入分辨率小8倍甚至4倍的输出特征图在计算上是不可行的。以ResNet-101 [25]为例，当应用空洞卷积提取比输入分辨率小16倍的输出特征时，最后3个残差块（9层）中的特征必须被膨胀。更糟糕的是，如果需要比输入小8倍的输出特征，将有26个残差块（78层！）受到影响。因此，对于这类模型，提取更密集的输出特征在计算上是密集的。另一方面，编码器-解码器模型[21,22]在编码器路径中计算更快（因为没有特征被膨胀），并在解码器路径中逐渐恢复清晰的对象边界。为了结合两种方法的优点，我们提出通过整合多尺度上下文信息来丰富编码器-解码器网络中的编码器模块。

items.en: In particular, our proposed model, called DeepLabv3+, extends DeepLabv3 [23] by adding a simple yet effective decoder module to recover the object boundaries, as illustrated in Fig. 1. The rich semantic information is encoded in the output of DeepLabv3, with atrous convolution allowing one to control the density of the encoder features, depending on the budget of computation resources. Furthermore, the decoder module allows detailed object boundary recovery.
items.zh: 具体来说，我们提出的模型DeepLabv3+通过添加一个简单而有效的解码器模块来扩展DeepLabv3 [23]，以恢复对象边界，如图1所示。丰富的语义信息编码在DeepLabv3的输出中，空洞卷积允许根据计算资源预算控制编码器特征的密度。此外，解码器模块允许详细的对象边界恢复。

items.en: Motivated by the recent success of depthwise separable convolution [27, 28, 26, 29, 30], we also explore this operation and show improvement in terms of both speed and accuracy by adapting the Xception model [26], similar to [31], for the task of semantic segmentation, and applying the atrous separable convolution to both the ASPP and decoder modules. Finally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed model on PASCAL VOC 2012 and Cityscapes datasts and attain the test set performance of 89.0% and 82.1% without any post-processing, setting a new state-of-the-art.
items.zh: 受深度可分离卷积[27,28,26,29,30]最近成功的启发，我们也探索了这种操作，并通过改编Xception模型[26]（类似于[31]）用于语义分割任务，并将空洞可分离卷积应用于ASPP和解码器模块，展示了在速度和准确性方面的改进。最后，我们在PASCAL VOC 2012和Cityscapes数据集上展示了所提模型的有效性，在没有任何后处理的情况下，测试集性能分别达到89.0%和82.1%，创造了新的最先进水平。

items.en: We propose a novel encoder-decoder structure which employs DeepLabv3 as a powerful encoder module and a simple yet effective decoder module.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的编码器-解码器结构，该结构采用DeepLabv3作为强大的编码器模块，并采用一个简单而有效的解码器模块。

items.en: In our structure, one can arbitrarily control the resolution of extracted encoder features by atrous convolution to trade-off precision and runtime, which is not possible with existing encoder-decoder models.
items.zh: 在我们的结构中，可以通过空洞卷积任意控制提取的编码器特征的分辨率，以在精度和运行时间之间进行权衡，这在现有的编码器-解码器模型中是不可能的。

items.en: We adapt the Xception model for the segmentation task and apply depthwise separable convolution to both ASPP module and decoder module, resulting in a faster and stronger encoder-decoder network.
items.zh: 我们改编了Xception模型用于分割任务，并将深度可分离卷积应用于ASPP模块和解码器模块，从而得到一个更快更强的编码器-解码器网络。

items.en: Our proposed model attains a new state-of-art performance on PASCAL VOC 2012 and Cityscapes datasets. We also provide detailed analysis of design choices and model variants.
items.zh: 我们提出的模型在PASCAL VOC 2012和Cityscapes数据集上达到了新的最先进性能。我们还提供了设计选择和模型变体的详细分析。

items.en: We make our Tensorflow-based implementation of the proposed model publicly available at https://github.com/tensorflow/models/tree/master/research/deeplab.
items.zh: 我们将所提模型的基于Tensorflow的实现公开在https://github.com/tensorflow/models/tree/master/research/deeplab。

items.en: Models based on Fully Convolutional Networks (FCNs) [8, 11] have demonstrated significant improvement on several segmentation benchmarks [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]. There are several model variants proposed to exploit the contextual information for segmentation [12, 13, 14, 15, 16, 17, 32, 33], including those that employ multi-scale inputs (i.e., image pyramid) [34, 35, 36, 37, 38, 39] or those that adopt probabilistic graphical models (such as DenseCRF [40] with efficient inference algorithm [41]) [42, 43, 44, 37, 45, 46, 47, 48, 49, 50, 51, 39]. In this work, we mainly discuss about the models that use spatial pyramid pooling and encoder-decoder structure.
items.zh: 基于全卷积网络（FCNs）[8,11]的模型在多个分割基准[1,2,3,4,5]上显示出显著改进。提出了几种模型变体来利用分割的上下文信息[12,13,14,15,16,17,32,33]，包括采用多尺度输入（即图像金字塔）[34,35,36,37,38,39]或采用概率图模型（如具有高效推理算法[41]的DenseCRF [40]）[42,43,44,37,45,46,47,48,49,50,51,39]的模型。在这项工作中，我们主要讨论使用空间金字塔池化和编码器-解码器结构的模型。

items.en: Spatial pyramid pooling: Models, such as PSPNet [24] or DeepLab [39, 23], perform spatial pyramid pooling [18, 19] at several grid scales (including image-level pooling [52]) or apply several parallel atrous convolution with different rates (called Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling, or ASPP). These models have shown promising results on several segmentation benchmarks by exploiting the multi-scale information.
items.zh: 空间金字塔池化：诸如PSPNet [24]或DeepLab [39,23]等模型，在几个网格尺度（包括图像级池化[52]）上执行空间金字塔池化[18,19]，或应用几个具有不同速率的并行空洞卷积（称为空洞空间金字塔池化，或ASPP）。这些模型通过利用多尺度信息，在多个分割基准上显示出有希望的结果。

items.en: Encoder-decoder: The encoder-decoder networks have been successfully applied to many computer vision tasks, including human pose estimation [53], object detection [54, 55, 56], and semantic segmentation [11, 57, 21, 22, 58, 59, 60, 61, 62, 63, 64]. Typically, the encoder-decoder networks contain (1) an encoder module that gradually reduces the feature maps and captures higher semantic information, and (2) a decoder module that gradually recovers the spatial information. Building on top of this idea, we propose to use DeepLabv3 [23] as the encoder module and add a simple yet effective decoder module to obtain sharper segmentations.
items.zh: 编码器-解码器：编码器-解码器网络已成功应用于许多计算机视觉任务，包括人体姿态估计[53]、目标检测[54,55,56]和语义分割[11,57,21,22,58,59,60,61,62,63,64]。通常，编码器-解码器网络包含（1）一个编码器模块，逐渐减小特征图并捕获更高层次的语义信息，以及（2）一个解码器模块，逐渐恢复空间信息。基于这一思想，我们提出使用DeepLabv3 [23]作为编码器模块，并添加一个简单而有效的解码器模块以获得更清晰的分割结果。

items.en: Depthwise separable convolution: Depthwise separable convolution [27, 28] or group convolution [7, 65], a powerful operation to reduce the computation cost and number of parameters while maintaining similar (or slightly better) performance. This operation has been adopted in many recent neural network designs [66, 67, 26, 29, 30, 31, 68]. In particular, we explore the Xception model [26], similar to [31] for their COCO 2017 detection challenge submission, and show improvement in terms of both accuracy and speed for the task of semantic segmentation.
items.zh: 深度可分离卷积：深度可分离卷积[27,28]或分组卷积[7,65]是一种强大的操作，可以在保持相似（或略好）性能的同时减少计算成本和参数数量。这种操作已被许多最近的神经网络设计采用[66,67,26,29,30,31,68]。具体来说，我们探索了Xception模型[26]，类似于[31]用于他们的COCO 2017检测挑战提交，并展示了在语义分割任务中准确性和速度方面的改进。

items.en: In this section, we briefly introduce atrous convolution [69, 70, 8, 71, 42] and depthwise separable convolution [27, 28, 67, 26, 29]. We then review DeepLabv3 [23] which is used as our encoder module before discussing the proposed decoder module appended to the encoder output. We also present a modified Xception model [26, 31] which further improves the performance with faster computation.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们简要介绍空洞卷积[69,70,8,71,42]和深度可分离卷积[27,28,67,26,29]。然后我们回顾DeepLabv3 [23]，它被用作我们的编码器模块，之后讨论附加到编码器输出的所提解码器模块。我们还介绍了一个修改后的Xception模型[26,31]，它通过更快的计算进一步提高了性能。

full.secZh: 3.1 带空洞卷积的编码器-解码器

items.capEn: Figure 2: Our proposed DeepLabv3+ extends DeepLabv3 by employing a encoder-decoder structure. The encoder module encodes multi-scale contextual information by applying atrous convolution at multiple scales, while the simple yet effective decoder module refines the segmentation results along object boundaries.
items.capZh: 图2：我们提出的DeepLabv3+通过采用编码器-解码器结构扩展了DeepLabv3。编码器模块通过在多个尺度上应用空洞卷积来编码多尺度上下文信息，而简单而有效的解码器模块沿对象边界细化分割结果。

items.en: Atrous convolution: Atrous convolution, a powerful tool that allows us to explicitly control the resolution of features computed by deep convolutional neural networks and adjust filter’s field-of-view in order to capture multi-scale information, generalizes standard convolution operation. In the case of two-dimensional signals, for each location 𝒊𝒊\boldsymbol{i} on the output feature map 𝒚𝒚\boldsymbol{y} and a convolution filter 𝒘𝒘\boldsymbol{w}, atrous convolution is applied over the input feature map 𝒙𝒙\boldsymbol{x} as follows:
items.zh: 空洞卷积：空洞卷积是一种强大的工具，允许我们显式控制深度卷积神经网络计算的特征的分辨率，并调整滤波器的视野以捕获多尺度信息，它推广了标准卷积操作。在二维信号的情况下，对于输出特征图𝒚上的每个位置𝒊和卷积滤波器𝒘，空洞卷积应用于输入特征图𝒙如下：

items.en: where the atrous rate r determines the stride with which we sample the input signal. We refer interested readers to [39] for more details. Note that standard convolution is a special case in which rate r=1𝑟1r=1. The filter’s field-of-view is adaptively modified by changing the rate value.
items.zh: 其中空洞率r决定了采样输入信号的步长。我们请感兴趣的读者参考[39]了解更多细节。注意，标准卷积是速率r=1的特殊情况。通过改变速率值，可以自适应地修改滤波器的视野。

items.en: Depthwise separable convolution: Depthwise separable convolution, factorizing a standard convolution into a depthwise convolution followed by a pointwise convolution (i.e., 1×1111\times 1 convolution), drastically reduces computation complexity. Specifically, the depthwise convolution performs a spatial convolution independently for each input channel, while the pointwise convolution is employed to combine the output from the depthwise convolution. In the TensorFlow [72] implementation of depthwise separable convolution, atrous convolution has been supported in the depthwise convolution (i.e., the spatial convolution), as illustrated in Fig. 3. In this work, we refer the resulting convolution as atrous separable convolution, and found that atrous separable convolution significantly reduces the computation complexity of proposed model while maintaining similar (or better) performance.
items.zh: 深度可分离卷积：深度可分离卷积将标准卷积分解为深度卷积后接逐点卷积（即1×1卷积），大幅降低了计算复杂度。具体来说，深度卷积独立地对每个输入通道执行空间卷积，而逐点卷积用于组合深度卷积的输出。在TensorFlow [72]的深度可分离卷积实现中，深度卷积（即空间卷积）已支持空洞卷积，如图3所示。在这项工作中，我们将得到的卷积称为空洞可分离卷积，并发现空洞可分离卷积显著降低了所提模型的计算复杂度，同时保持了相似（或更好）的性能。

items.capEn: Figure 3: 3×3333\times 3 Depthwise separable convolution decomposes a standard convolution into (a) a depthwise convolution (applying a single filter for each input channel) and (b) a pointwise convolution (combining the outputs from depthwise convolution across channels). In this work, we explore atrous separable convolution where atrous convolution is adopted in the depthwise convolution, as shown in (c) with r​a​t​e=2𝑟𝑎𝑡𝑒2rate=2.
items.capZh: 图3：3×3深度可分离卷积将标准卷积分解为(a)深度卷积（对每个输入通道应用单个滤波器）和(b)逐点卷积（跨通道组合深度卷积的输出）。本文探索了空洞可分离卷积，其中深度卷积采用空洞卷积，如(c)所示，rate=2。

items.en: DeepLabv3 as encoder: DeepLabv3 [23] employs atrous convolution [69, 70, 8, 71] to extract the features computed by deep convolutional neural networks at an arbitrary resolution. Here, we denote output stride as the ratio of input image spatial resolution to the final output resolution (before global pooling or fully-connected layer). For the task of image classification, the spatial resolution of the final feature maps is usually 32 times smaller than the input image resolution and thus output stride=32output stride32\emph{output\ stride}=32. For the task of semantic segmentation, one can adopt output stride=16output stride16\emph{output\ stride}=16 (or 888) for denser feature extraction by removing the striding in the last one (or two) block(s) and applying the atrous convolution correspondingly (e.g., we apply r​a​t​e=2𝑟𝑎𝑡𝑒2rate=2 and r​a​t​e=4𝑟𝑎𝑡𝑒4rate=4 to the last two blocks respectively for output stride=8output stride8\emph{output\ stride}=8). Additionally, DeepLabv3 augments the Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling module, which probes convolutional features at multiple scales by applying atrous convolution with different rates, with the image-level features [52]. We use the last feature map before logits in the original DeepLabv3 as the encoder output in our proposed encoder-decoder structure. Note the encoder output feature map contains 256 channels and rich semantic information. Besides, one could extract features at an arbitrary resolution by applying the atrous convolution, depending on the computation budget.
items.zh: DeepLabv3作为编码器：DeepLabv3 [23]采用空洞卷积[69, 70, 8, 71]以任意分辨率提取深度卷积神经网络计算的特征。这里，我们将输出步幅定义为输入图像空间分辨率与最终输出分辨率（在全局池化或全连接层之前）的比值。对于图像分类任务，最终特征图的空间分辨率通常是输入图像分辨率的1/32，因此输出步幅=32。对于语义分割任务，可以采用输出步幅=16（或8）来提取更密集的特征，方法是在最后一个（或两个）块中移除步幅并相应地应用空洞卷积（例如，对于输出步幅=8，我们在最后两个块分别应用rate=2和rate=4）。此外，DeepLabv3增强了空洞空间金字塔池化模块，该模块通过应用不同率的空洞卷积来探测多尺度的卷积特征，并结合图像级特征[52]。我们在提出的编码器-解码器结构中使用原始DeepLabv3中logits之前的最后一个特征图作为编码器输出。注意，编码器输出特征图包含256个通道和丰富的语义信息。此外，可以根据计算预算，通过应用空洞卷积以任意分辨率提取特征。

items.en: Proposed decoder: The encoder features from DeepLabv3 are usually computed with output stride=16output stride16\emph{output\ stride}=16. In the work of [23], the features are bilinearly upsampled by a factor of 16, which could be considered a naive decoder module. However, this naive decoder module may not successfully recover object segmentation details. We thus propose a simple yet effective decoder module, as illustrated in Fig. 2. The encoder features are first bilinearly upsampled by a factor of 4 and then concatenated with the corresponding low-level features [73] from the network backbone that have the same spatial resolution (e.g., Conv2 before striding in ResNet-101 [25]). We apply another 1×1111\times 1 convolution on the low-level features to reduce the number of channels, since the corresponding low-level features usually contain a large number of channels (e.g., 256 or 512) which may outweigh the importance of the rich encoder features (only 256 channels in our model) and make the training harder. After the concatenation, we apply a few 3×3333\times 3 convolutions to refine the features followed by another simple bilinear upsampling by a factor of 4. We show in Sec. 4 that using output stride=16output stride16\emph{output\ stride}=16 for the encoder module strikes the best trade-off between speed and accuracy. The performance is marginally improved when using output stride=8output stride8\emph{output\ stride}=8 for the encoder module at the cost of extra computation complexity.
items.zh: 提出的解码器：来自DeepLabv3的编码器特征通常以输出步幅=16计算。在[23]的工作中，特征通过双线性插值上采样16倍，这可以视为一个简单的解码器模块。然而，这种简单的解码器模块可能无法成功恢复对象分割细节。因此，我们提出了一个简单而有效的解码器模块，如图2所示。编码器特征首先通过双线性插值上采样4倍，然后与来自网络骨干的具有相同空间分辨率的相应低层特征[73]（例如，ResNet-101 [25]中步幅之前的Conv2）拼接。我们在低层特征上应用另一个1×1卷积以减少通道数，因为相应的低层特征通常包含大量通道（例如256或512），这可能会掩盖丰富编码器特征（我们的模型中仅256个通道）的重要性，并使训练更加困难。拼接后，我们应用几个3×3卷积来细化特征，然后进行另一个简单的双线性上采样4倍。我们在第4节中展示，对编码器模块使用输出步幅=16在速度和精度之间取得了最佳平衡。当对编码器模块使用输出步幅=8时，性能略有提升，但以额外的计算复杂度为代价。

items.capEn: Figure 4: We modify the Xception as follows: (1) more layers (same as MSRA’s modification except the changes in Entry flow), (2) all the max pooling operations are replaced by depthwise separable convolutions with striding, and (3) extra batch normalization and ReLU are added after each 3×3333\times 3 depthwise convolution, similar to MobileNet.
items.capZh: 图4：我们对Xception进行了如下修改：(1) 更多层（与MSRA的修改相同，但Entry flow中的变化除外），(2) 所有最大池化操作被替换为带步幅的深度可分离卷积，(3) 在每个3×3深度卷积之后添加额外的批归一化和ReLU，类似于MobileNet。

items.en: The Xception model [26] has shown promising image classification results on ImageNet [74] with fast computation. More recently, the MSRA team [31] modifies the Xception model (called Aligned Xception) and further pushes the performance in the task of object detection. Motivated by these findings, we work in the same direction to adapt the Xception model for the task of semantic image segmentation. In particular, we make a few more changes on top of MSRA’s modifications, namely (1) deeper Xception same as in [31] except that we do not modify the entry flow network structure for fast computation and memory efficiency, (2) all max pooling operations are replaced by depthwise separable convolution with striding, which enables us to apply atrous separable convolution to extract feature maps at an arbitrary resolution (another option is to extend the atrous algorithm to max pooling operations), and (3) extra batch normalization [75] and ReLU activation are added after each 3×3333\times 3 depthwise convolution, similar to MobileNet design [29]. See Fig. 4 for details.
items.zh: Xception模型[26]在ImageNet [74]上展示了有前景的图像分类结果，且计算速度快。最近，MSRA团队[31]修改了Xception模型（称为Aligned Xception），并在目标检测任务中进一步提升了性能。受这些发现的启发，我们朝着相同的方向努力，将Xception模型适应于语义图像分割任务。具体来说，我们在MSRA修改的基础上进行了更多更改，即(1) 与[31]中相同的更深层Xception，但为了快速计算和内存效率，我们没有修改entry flow网络结构，(2) 所有最大池化操作被替换为带步幅的深度可分离卷积，这使我们能够应用空洞可分离卷积以任意分辨率提取特征图（另一种选择是将空洞算法扩展到最大池化操作），(3) 在每个3×3深度卷积之后添加额外的批归一化[75]和ReLU激活，类似于MobileNet设计[29]。详情见图4。

items.en: We employ ImageNet-1k [74] pretrained ResNet-101 [25] or modified aligned Xception [26, 31] to extract dense feature maps by atrous convolution. Our implementation is built on TensorFlow [72] and is made publicly available.
items.zh: 我们采用在ImageNet-1k [74]上预训练的ResNet-101 [25]或修改后的对齐Xception [26, 31]，通过空洞卷积提取密集特征图。我们的实现基于TensorFlow [72]，并已公开。

items.en: The proposed models are evaluated on the PASCAL VOC 2012 semantic segmentation benchmark [1] which contains 20 foreground object classes and one background class. The original dataset contains 1,46414641,464 (train), 1,44914491,449 (val), and 1,45614561,456 (test) pixel-level annotated images. We augment the dataset by the extra annotations provided by [76], resulting in 10,5821058210,582 (trainaug) training images. The performance is measured in terms of pixel intersection-over-union averaged across the 21 classes (mIOU).
items.zh: 所提出的模型在PASCAL VOC 2012语义分割基准[1]上进行评估，该基准包含20个前景对象类别和1个背景类别。原始数据集包含1,464（训练）、1,449（验证）和1,456（测试）张像素级标注图像。我们通过[76]提供的额外标注扩充数据集，得到10,582（trainaug）张训练图像。性能以21个类别的平均像素交并比（mIOU）衡量。

items.en: We follow the same training protocol as in [23] and refer the interested readers to [23] for details. In short, we employ the same learning rate schedule (i.e., “poly” policy [52] and same initial learning rate 0.0070.0070.007), crop size 513×513513513513\times 513, fine-tuning batch normalization parameters [75] when output stride=16output stride16\emph{output\ stride}=16, and random scale data augmentation during training. Note that we also include batch normalization parameters in the proposed decoder module. Our proposed model is trained end-to-end without piecewise pretraining of each component.
items.zh: 我们遵循与[23]相同的训练协议，感兴趣的读者可参阅[23]了解详情。简而言之，我们采用相同的学习率调度（即“poly”策略[52]和相同的初始学习率0.007）、裁剪尺寸513×513、在输出步幅=16时微调批归一化参数[75]，以及在训练期间进行随机尺度数据增强。注意，我们还在提出的解码器模块中包含了批归一化参数。我们提出的模型是端到端训练的，无需对每个组件进行分片预训练。

items.en: We define “DeepLabv3 feature map” as the last feature map computed by DeepLabv3 (i.e., the features containing ASPP features and image-level features), and [k×k,f]𝑘𝑘𝑓[k\times k,f] as a convolution operation with kernel k×k𝑘𝑘k\times k and f𝑓f filters.
items.zh: 我们将“DeepLabv3特征图”定义为DeepLabv3计算的最后一个特征图（即包含ASPP特征和图像级特征的特征），并将[k×k, f]定义为具有k×k核和f个滤波器的卷积操作。

items.en: When employing output stride=16output stride16\emph{output\ stride}=16, ResNet-101 based DeepLabv3 [23] bilinearly upsamples the logits by 161616 during both training and evaluation. This simple bilinear upsampling could be considered as a naive decoder design, attaining the performance of 77.21%percent77.2177.21\% [23] on PASCAL VOC 2012 val set and is 1.2%percent1.21.2\% better than not using this naive decoder during training (i.e., downsampling groundtruth during training). To improve over this naive baseline, our proposed model “DeepLabv3+” adds the decoder module on top of the encoder output, as shown in Fig. 2. In the decoder module, we consider three places for different design choices, namely (1) the 1×1111\times 1 convolution used to reduce the channels of the low-level feature map from the encoder module, (2) the 3×3333\times 3 convolution used to obtain sharper segmentation results, and (3) what encoder low-level features should be used.
items.zh: 当采用输出步幅=16时，基于ResNet-101的DeepLabv3 [23]在训练和评估期间将logits双线性上采样16倍。这种简单的双线性上采样可视为一种简单的解码器设计，在PASCAL VOC 2012验证集上达到77.21% [23]的性能，比在训练期间不使用这种简单解码器（即在训练期间对groundtruth进行下采样）好1.2%。为了改进这个简单基线，我们提出的模型“DeepLabv3+”在编码器输出之上添加了解码器模块，如图2所示。在解码器模块中，我们考虑了三个不同设计选择的位置，即(1) 用于减少来自编码器模块的低层特征图通道的1×1卷积，(2) 用于获得更清晰分割结果的3×3卷积，以及(3) 应使用哪些编码器低层特征。

items.en: To evaluate the effect of the 1×1111\times 1 convolution in the decoder module, we employ [3×3,256]33256[3\times 3,256] and the Conv2 features from ResNet-101 network backbone, i.e., the last feature map in res2x residual block (to be concrete, we use the feature map before striding). As shown in Tab. 1, reducing the channels of the low-level feature map from the encoder module to either 48 or 32 leads to better performance. We thus adopt [1×1,48]1148[1\times 1,48] for channel reduction.
items.zh: 为了评估解码器模块中1×1卷积的效果，我们采用[3×3, 256]和来自ResNet-101网络骨干的Conv2特征，即res2x残差块中的最后一个特征图（具体来说，我们使用步幅之前的特征图）。如表1所示，将来自编码器模块的低层特征图的通道数减少到48或32会带来更好的性能。因此，我们采用[1×1, 48]进行通道缩减。

items.en: We then design the 3×3333\times 3 convolution structure for the decoder module and report the findings in Tab. 2. We find that after concatenating the Conv2 feature map (before striding) with DeepLabv3 feature map, it is more effective to employ two 3×3333\times 3 convolution with 256 filters than using simply one or three convolutions. Changing the number of filters from 256 to 128 or the kernel size from 3×3333\times 3 to 1×1111\times 1 degrades performance. We also experiment with the case where both Conv2 and Conv3 feature maps are exploited in the decoder module. In this case, the decoder feature map are gradually upsampled by 2, concatenated with Conv3 first and then Conv2, and each will be refined by the [3×3,256]33256[3\times 3,256] operation. The whole decoding procedure is then similar to the U-Net/SegNet design [21, 22]. However, we have not observed significant improvement. Thus, in the end, we adopt the very simple yet effective decoder module: the concatenation of the DeepLabv3 feature map and the channel-reduced Conv2 feature map are refined by two [3×3,256]33256[3\times 3,256] operations. Note that our proposed DeepLabv3+ model has output stride=4output stride4\emph{output\ stride}=4. We do not pursue further denser output feature map (i.e., output stride<4output stride4\emph{output\ stride}<4) given the limited GPU resources.
items.zh: 然后，我们为解码器模块设计3×3卷积结构，并将发现报告在表2中。我们发现，在将Conv2特征图（步幅之前）与DeepLabv3特征图拼接后，采用两个具有256个滤波器的3×3卷积比仅使用一个或三个卷积更有效。将滤波器数量从256改为128或将核大小从3×3改为1×1会降低性能。我们还实验了在解码器模块中同时利用Conv2和Conv3特征图的情况。在这种情况下，解码器特征图逐步上采样2倍，首先与Conv3拼接，然后与Conv2拼接，每个都通过[3×3, 256]操作进行细化。整个解码过程类似于U-Net/SegNet设计[21, 22]。然而，我们没有观察到显著的改进。因此，最终我们采用了非常简单而有效的解码器模块：DeepLabv3特征图与通道缩减后的Conv2特征图拼接后，通过两个[3×3, 256]操作进行细化。注意，我们提出的DeepLabv3+模型的输出步幅=4。鉴于有限的GPU资源，我们没有追求更密集的输出特征图（即输出步幅<4）。

items.en: To compare the model variants in terms of both accuracy and speed, we report mIOU and Multiply-Adds in Tab. 3 when using ResNet-101 [25] as network backbone in the proposed DeepLabv3+ model. Thanks to atrous convolution, we are able to obtain features at different resolutions during training and evaluation using a single model.
items.zh: 为了比较模型变体在精度和速度方面的表现，我们在表3中报告了使用ResNet-101 [25]作为网络骨干的DeepLabv3+模型的mIOU和乘加操作数。得益于空洞卷积，我们能够在训练和评估期间使用单个模型获得不同分辨率的特征。

items.en: Baseline: The first row block in Tab. 3 contains the results from [23] showing that extracting denser feature maps during evaluation (i.e., eval output stride=8eval output stride8\emph{eval\ output\ stride}=8) and adopting multi-scale inputs increases performance. Besides, adding left-right flipped inputs doubles the computation complexity with only marginal performance improvement.
items.zh: 基线：表3中的第一行块包含[23]的结果，显示在评估期间提取更密集的特征图（即评估输出步幅=8）并采用多尺度输入可以提高性能。此外，添加左右翻转输入会使计算复杂度加倍，但性能提升很小。

items.en: Adding decoder: The second row block in Tab. 3 contains the results when adopting the proposed decoder structure. The performance is improved from 77.21%percent77.2177.21\% to 78.85%percent78.8578.85\% or 78.51%percent78.5178.51\% to 79.35%percent79.3579.35\% when using eval output stride=16eval output stride16\emph{eval\ output\ stride}=16 or 888, respectively, at the cost of about 20B extra computation overhead. The performance is further improved when using multi-scale and left-right flipped inputs.
items.zh: 添加解码器：表3中的第二行块包含采用所提出的解码器结构的结果。当使用评估输出步幅=16或8时，性能分别从77.21%提高到78.85%或从78.51%提高到79.35%，代价是增加了约20B的额外计算开销。当使用多尺度和左右翻转输入时，性能进一步提高。

items.en: Coarser feature maps: We also experiment with the case when using train output stride=32train output stride32\emph{train\ output\ stride}=32 (i.e., no atrous convolution at all during training) for fast computation. As shown in the third row block in Tab. 3, adding the decoder brings about 2% improvement while only 74.20B Multiply-Adds are required. However, the performance is always about 1% to 1.5% below the case in which we employ train output stride=16train output stride16\emph{train\ output\ stride}=16 and different eval output stride values. We thus prefer using output stride=16output stride16\emph{output\ stride}=16 or 888 during training or evaluation depending on the complexity budget.
items.zh: 更粗糙的特征图：我们还实验了在训练期间使用训练输出步幅=32（即训练期间完全不使用空洞卷积）以实现快速计算的情况。如表3的第三行块所示，添加解码器带来了约2%的提升，而仅需要74.20B的乘加操作数。然而，性能总是比采用训练输出步幅=16和不同评估输出步幅值的情况低约1%到1.5%。因此，我们更倾向于根据复杂度预算在训练或评估期间使用输出步幅=16或8。

items.en: We further employ the more powerful Xception [26] as network backbone. Following [31], we make a few more changes, as described in Sec. 3.2.
items.zh: 我们进一步采用更强大的Xception [26]作为网络骨干。遵循[31]，我们进行了一些额外的更改，如第3.2节所述。

items.en: ImageNet pretraining: The proposed Xception network is pretrained on ImageNet-1k dataset [74] with similar training protocol in [26]. Specifically, we adopt Nesterov momentum optimizer with momentum = 0.9, initial learning rate = 0.05, rate decay = 0.94 every 2 epochs, and weight decay 4​e−54𝑒54e-5. We use asynchronous training with 50 GPUs and each GPU has batch size 32 with image size 299×299299299299\times 299. We did not tune the hyper-parameters very hard as the goal is to pretrain the model on ImageNet for semantic segmentation. We report the single-model error rates on the validation set in Tab. 4 along with the baseline reproduced ResNet-101 [25] under the same training protocol. We have observed 0.75% and 0.29% performance degradation for Top1 and Top5 accuracy when not adding the extra batch normalization and ReLU after each 3×3333\times 3 depthwise convolution in the modified Xception.
items.zh: ImageNet预训练：所提出的Xception网络在ImageNet-1k数据集[74]上使用与[26]类似的训练协议进行预训练。具体来说，我们采用Nesterov动量优化器，动量=0.9，初始学习率=0.05，每2个epoch学习率衰减0.94，权重衰减4e-5。我们使用50个GPU进行异步训练，每个GPU的批大小为32，图像尺寸为299×299。我们没有非常严格地调整超参数，因为目标是在ImageNet上预训练模型以用于语义分割。我们在表4中报告了验证集上的单模型错误率，以及在同一训练协议下复现的ResNet-101 [25]基线。我们观察到，在修改后的Xception中，如果不在每个3×3深度卷积后添加额外的批归一化和ReLU，Top1和Top5准确率分别下降0.75%和0.29%。

items.en: The results of using the proposed Xception as network backbone for semantic segmentation are reported in Tab. 5.
items.zh: 使用所提出的Xception作为语义分割网络骨干的结果报告在表5中。

items.en: Baseline: We first report the results without using the proposed decoder in the first row block in Tab. 5, which shows that employing Xception as network backbone improves the performance by about 2% when train output stride=eval output stride=16train output strideeval output stride16\emph{train\ output\ stride}=\emph{eval\ output\ stride}=16 over the case where ResNet-101 is used. Further improvement can also be obtained by using eval output stride=8eval output stride8\emph{eval\ output\ stride}=8, multi-scale inputs during inference and adding left-right flipped inputs. Note that we do not employ the multi-grid method [77, 78, 23], which we found does not improve the performance.
items.zh: 基线：我们首先在表5的第一行块中报告不使用所提出的解码器的结果，这表明当训练输出步幅=评估输出步幅=16时，使用Xception作为网络骨干比使用ResNet-101的性能提高了约2%。通过使用评估输出步幅=8、推理期间的多尺度输入以及添加左右翻转输入，还可以获得进一步的改进。注意，我们没有采用多网格方法[77, 78, 23]，因为我们发现它没有提高性能。

items.en: Adding decoder: As shown in the second row block in Tab. 5, adding decoder brings about 0.8% improvement when using eval output stride=16eval output stride16\emph{eval\ output\ stride}=16 for all the different inference strategies. The improvement becomes less when using eval output stride=8eval output stride8\emph{eval\ output\ stride}=8.
items.zh: 添加解码器：如表5第二行块所示，当对所有不同推理策略使用评估输出步幅=16时，添加解码器带来约0.8%的提升。当使用评估输出步幅=8时，提升幅度变小。

items.en: Using depthwise separable convolution: Motivated by the efficient computation of depthwise separable convolution, we further adopt it in the ASPP and the decoder modules. As shown in the third row block in Tab. 5, the computation complexity in terms of Multiply-Adds is significantly reduced by 33% to 41%, while similar mIOU performance is obtained.
items.zh: 使用深度可分离卷积：受深度可分离卷积高效计算的启发，我们进一步在ASPP和解码器模块中采用它。如表5第三行块所示，以乘加运算衡量的计算复杂度显著降低了33%至41%，同时获得了相似的mIOU性能。

items.en: Pretraining on COCO: For comparison with other state-of-art models, we further pretrain our proposed DeepLabv3+ model on MS-COCO dataset [79], which yields about extra 2% improvement for all different inference strategies.
items.zh: 在COCO上预训练：为了与其他最先进模型进行比较，我们进一步在MS-COCO数据集[79]上预训练我们提出的DeepLabv3+模型，这为所有不同的推理策略带来了约额外2%的提升。

items.en: Pretraining on JFT: Similar to [23], we also employ the proposed Xception model that has been pretrained on both ImageNet-1k [74] and JFT-300M dataset [80, 26, 81], which brings extra 0.8% to 1% improvement.
items.zh: 在JFT上预训练：与[23]类似，我们还采用了已在ImageNet-1k [74]和JFT-300M数据集[80, 26, 81]上预训练的Xception模型，这带来了额外0.8%至1%的提升。

items.en: Test set results: Since the computation complexity is not considered in the benchmark evaluation, we thus opt for the best performance model and train it with output stride=8output stride8\emph{output\ stride}=8 and frozen batch normalization parameters. In the end, our ‘DeepLabv3+’ achieves the performance of 87.8% and 89.0% without and with JFT dataset pretraining.
items.zh: 测试集结果：由于基准评估中不考虑计算复杂度，因此我们选择最佳性能模型，并使用输出步幅=8和冻结的批归一化参数进行训练。最终，我们的'DeepLabv3+'在未使用和使用JFT数据集预训练的情况下分别达到了87.8%和89.0%的性能。

items.en: Qualitative results: We provide visual results of our best model in Fig. 6. As shown in the figure, our model is able to segment objects very well without any post-processing.
items.zh: 定性结果：我们在图6中提供了最佳模型的可视化结果。如图所示，我们的模型无需任何后处理就能很好地分割物体。

items.en: Failure mode: As shown in the last row of Fig. 6, our model has difficulty in segmenting (a) sofa vs. chair, (b) heavily occluded objects, and (c) objects with rare view.
items.zh: 失败模式：如图6最后一行所示，我们的模型在分割（a）沙发与椅子、（b）严重遮挡的物体以及（c）罕见视角的物体时存在困难。

items.en: In this subsection, we evaluate the segmentation accuracy with the trimap experiment [14, 40, 39] to quantify the accuracy of the proposed decoder module near object boundaries. Specifically, we apply the morphological dilation on ‘void’ label annotations on val set, which typically occurs around object boundaries. We then compute the mean IOU for those pixels that are within the dilated band (called trimap) of ‘void’ labels. As shown in Fig. 5 (a), employing the proposed decoder for both ResNet-101 [25] and Xception [26] network backbones improves the performance compared to the naive bilinear upsampling. The improvement is more significant when the dilated band is narrow. We have observed 4.8% and 5.4% mIOU improvement for ResNet-101 and Xception respectively at the smallest trimap width as shown in the figure. We also visualize the effect of employing the proposed decoder in Fig. 5 (b).
items.zh: 在本小节中，我们通过trimap实验[14, 40, 39]评估分割精度，以量化所提出的解码器模块在物体边界附近的精度。具体来说，我们对验证集上的'void'标签标注应用形态学膨胀，这些标签通常出现在物体边界周围。然后，我们计算位于'void'标签膨胀带（称为trimap）内的那些像素的平均IOU。如图5（a）所示，对于ResNet-101 [25]和Xception [26]网络骨干，采用所提出的解码器相比朴素双线性上采样提升了性能。当膨胀带较窄时，提升更为显著。如图所示，在最小trimap宽度下，我们观察到ResNet-101和Xception分别有4.8%和5.4%的mIOU提升。我们还在图5（b）中可视化了采用所提出解码器的效果。

items.capEn: Figure 5: (a) mIOU as a function of trimap band width around the object boundaries when employing train output stride=eval output stride=16train output strideeval output stride16\emph{train\ output\ stride}=\emph{eval\ output\ stride}=16. BU: Bilinear upsampling. (b) Qualitative effect of employing the proposed decoder module compared with the naive bilinear upsampling (denoted as BU). In the examples, we adopt Xception as feature extractor and train output stride=eval output stride=16train output strideeval output stride16\emph{train\ output\ stride}=\emph{eval\ output\ stride}=16.
items.capZh: 图5：（a）当使用训练输出步幅=评估输出步幅=16时，mIOU随物体边界周围trimap带宽度的变化。BU：双线性上采样。（b）与朴素双线性上采样（记为BU）相比，采用所提出的解码器模块的定性效果。在示例中，我们采用Xception作为特征提取器，训练输出步幅=评估输出步幅=16。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Visualization results on val set. The last row shows a failure mode.
items.capZh: 图6：验证集上的可视化结果。最后一行显示了一个失败模式。

items.en: In this section, we experiment DeepLabv3+ on the Cityscapes dataset [3], a large-scale dataset containing high quality pixel-level annotations of 5000 images (2975, 500, and 1525 for the training, validation, and test sets respectively) and about 20000 coarsely annotated images.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们在Cityscapes数据集[3]上实验DeepLabv3+，该数据集是一个大规模数据集，包含5000张图像的高质量像素级标注（训练集、验证集和测试集分别为2975、500和1525张）以及约20000张粗略标注的图像。

items.en: As shown in Tab. 7 (a), employing the proposed Xception model as network backbone (denoted as X-65) on top of DeepLabv3 [23], which includes the ASPP module and image-level features [52], attains the performance of 77.33% on the validation set. Adding the proposed decoder module significantly improves the performance to 78.79% (1.46% improvement). We notice that removing the augmented image-level feature improves the performance to 79.14%, showing that in DeepLab model, the image-level features are more effective on the PASCAL VOC 2012 dataset. We also discover that on the Cityscapes dataset, it is effective to increase more layers in the entry flow in the Xception [26], the same as what [31] did for the object detection task. The resulting model building on top of the deeper network backbone (denoted as X-71 in the table), attains the best performance of 79.55% on the validation set.
items.zh: 如表7（a）所示，在DeepLabv3 [23]（包括ASPP模块和图像级特征[52]）之上采用所提出的Xception模型作为网络骨干（记为X-65），在验证集上达到了77.33%的性能。添加所提出的解码器模块显著将性能提升至78.79%（提升1.46%）。我们注意到，移除增强的图像级特征将性能提升至79.14%，这表明在DeepLab模型中，图像级特征在PASCAL VOC 2012数据集上更有效。我们还发现，在Cityscapes数据集上，增加Xception [26]入口流中的层数是有效的，这与[31]在目标检测任务中所做的相同。由此产生的模型建立在更深的网络骨干（表中记为X-71）之上，在验证集上达到了79.55%的最佳性能。

items.en: After finding the best model variant on val set, we then further fine-tune the model on the coarse annotations in order to compete with other state-of-art models. As shown in Tab. 7 (b), our proposed DeepLabv3+ attains a performance of 82.1% on the test set, setting a new state-of-art performance on Cityscapes.
items.zh: 在验证集上找到最佳模型变体后，我们进一步在粗略标注上微调模型，以便与其他最先进模型竞争。如表7（b）所示，我们提出的DeepLabv3+在测试集上达到了82.1%的性能，在Cityscapes上创造了新的最先进性能。

items.en: Our proposed model “DeepLabv3+” employs the encoder-decoder structure where DeepLabv3 is used to encode the rich contextual information and a simple yet effective decoder module is adopted to recover the object boundaries. One could also apply the atrous convolution to extract the encoder features at an arbitrary resolution, depending on the available computation resources. We also explore the Xception model and atrous separable convolution to make the proposed model faster and stronger. Finally, our experimental results show that the proposed model sets a new state-of-the-art performance on PASCAL VOC 2012 and Cityscapes datasets.
items.zh: 我们提出的模型“DeepLabv3+”采用了编码器-解码器结构，其中DeepLabv3用于编码丰富的上下文信息，并采用简单而有效的解码器模块来恢复物体边界。还可以根据可用的计算资源，应用空洞卷积以任意分辨率提取编码器特征。我们还探索了Xception模型和空洞可分离卷积，以使所提出的模型更快更强。最后，我们的实验结果表明，所提出的模型在PASCAL VOC 2012和Cityscapes数据集上创造了新的最先进性能。

items.en: Acknowledgments We would like to acknowledge the valuable discussions with Haozhi Qi and Jifeng Dai about Aligned Xception, the feedback from Chen Sun, and the support from Google Mobile Vision team.
items.zh: 致谢 我们感谢与Haozhi Qi和Jifeng Dai关于对齐Xception的宝贵讨论，感谢Chen Sun的反馈，以及Google移动视觉团队的支持。
